title: Cobblemon Legion Reborn
description: A modpack based around exploring and becoming the very best. Challenge the official server gyms and try to become better than no one ever was
body:
Welcome to the Legion! Now with a custom modpack! This modpack aims to pose a fun challenege for my own personal server. This pack includes things such as Terralith for world exploration, Croptopia for world enhancements and of course, Cobblemon and many of its addons. Take on the offcial server player gyms and try to become the very best. Utilize the Create mod and build many contraptions or Chipped for the aspiring builder. Feel free to use this pack on your own server as well.

Official Discord Server: 

https://discord.gg/pgvy64zeaT
